string.text: Instead of picking out items at the start, a loadout will be generated for you with various items and a weapon. Each faction has different loadout possibilities. Is overridden by Isolated and Hated mode.
Unlock the advanced factions (ISG, Renegades, Sin) by default. Useful if you've already beaten the game but lost the completion due to update. Press Z on char select for zombified.
How many roubinis or cashola or bones your stalker starts with.
For those bored with Invictus runs, the ultimate challenge. No traders, no tasks, no disguises, the entire zone is hostile to you. Good luck... (overrides random loadout for Black Road)
Percent chance of finding a yellow stash on looting a corpse or finding a stash from a PDA. Only applies when Isolated and Hated is active.
Changes default state of ironman checkbox in character creation.
Changes default state of accessible zone checkbox in character creation.
Changes default gameplay difficulty in character creation.
Changes default economy difficulty in character creation.
Changes default number of ironman lives in character creation.
Changes default state of wishgranter life regeneration for ironman in character creation.

Change what conditions armors drop at when looting enemy stalkers.
 
 GAMMA Default: Vanilla GAMMA rules.
 
 GAMMA Boosted Mode: Similar rules to default regarding ranks but give a slight boost to condition.
 
 Roguelite Mode: Random condition on all armor drops, regardless of STALKER rank. Will never exceed a condition repairable by glues.
Looted guns spawn with better barrels?
Makes barrels on guns from dead stalkers have a much better chance to roll with usable damage values.
Chance for stash on looting corpse
Percent chance of finding a stash when looting dead stalkers. Only applies when Isolated and Hated is active.
Heal much faster at campfires at the cost of increased hunger and thirst drain. This drain can largely be cancelled by wearing a signet.
Increases ammo drops from worldspawn loot, stashes and RF packages.
Increases the total possible number of items RF packages can contain and increases the chances of additional items.

Choose the file that is used to populate loose spawns at game creation.
 
 GAMMA Default: Vanilla GAMMA world spawned items. No filling in of progression gaps for Isolated and Hated mode in world spawns. 
 
 I+H Normal Worldspawns: Items not normally found in GAMMA may spawn in the world to assist progression very rarely, including t1 recipes.
 
 I+H Balls Worldspawns: Worldspawn file used by Balls of Pure Diamond. No crafted items can spawn in the world but t1 recipes can. Rarer drop occurence than Normal. 
 
 I+H Awry7 Worldspawns: Worldspawn file used by Awry7. Many items that do not drop in normal GAMMA can drop here regularly. 
 
 Custom Worldspawns: Unchanged .ltx file. Edit dynamic_item_spawn_custom.ltx to change the worldspawn rules for your own playthrough.

Some presets for different types of Isolated and Hated playthroughs.
 
 I+H Default Mode: Longer playthrough with many GAMMA systems being tweaked to enable a smoother starting experience. Played by the mod creator with 1 life and no wishgranter. 
 
 I+H Balls Mode: An extremely long playthrough of I+H. Mostly default GAMMA rules with low chance for stashes off of bodies and yellow stashes. Played by Balls of Pure Diamond with 5 lives and a wishgranter life every 5 days. 
 
 I+H Accelerated Mode: A quicker playthrough of I+H, with many changes to speed up gear progression. Played by Awry7 with 1 life and no wishgranter.
